title: U.S. oil price tumbles below $92 as White House considers further talks with Iran
snippet: WTI fell ~8% to $91.28/bbl. Brent dropped 4%+ to $94.79/bbl. Decline driven by signals talks could resume. Markets react to Trump 'something happening in 2 days' comment. Contrast with physical market near $150/bbl.
tag_reason: 신규 — 유가 급락(WTI -8%)은 4/13 대비 반전된 새로운 흐름
